creator: groenveld@acm.org
text:
Joerg Schilling has a note in upstream schilytools devel snapshot:
-       cdda2wav: The default for the CDDB database has been changed from
        "freedb.freedb.org" -> "gnudb.gnudb.org" because freedb.freedb.org
        has been shut down forerver.

Try
$ env CDDBP_SERVER=gnudb.gnudb.org cdda2wav ...
John
groenveld@acm.org(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #0)
